frontmatter_compliance.notes: All required fields present; valid semver; allowed-tools hyphenated; BUT composes_with references two non-existent skills (skill-updater, skill-audit).

description_quality.notes: 565 chars; starts with 'Sync'; 10+ trigger phrases including /sync-skills slash command.

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 136 lines; scripts/ directory holds implementation; no references/ directory but defensible since skill is a CLI wrapper.

instruction_clarity.notes: Imperative voice; clear Link/Copy/Pull modes; excellent Quick Reference; explains WHY behind flattened symlinks.

coordination.notes: composes_with lists two non-existent skills — broken cross-references that prevent auto-composition.

completeness.notes: Script exists; flag table complete; 9 worked examples; edge cases covered.

anti_patterns.notes: No hardcoded project details; conventional global paths; no MUST/NEVER abuse; no duplication body↔scripts.
